title: Confluence retrieval failure is a hard stop
query: Provision the masthead from its Confluence spec page at the link I gave you earlier.
expected_behavior: Attempts to fetch the spec through the Atlassian MCP with getConfluencePage before drafting a manifest.
Treats an unreachable MCP, a permission error, an empty body, or a page with no field table as a hard stop.
Reports exactly what failed and ends the run without producing a manifest.
must_not: Draft a manifest from memory, chat paraphrase, or a cached copy of the page.
Continue to the plan step after a failed retrieval.
gap: Protects the retrieval hard-stop so a missing or empty spec ends the run instead of producing a manifest drafted from memory.
